items.visual_description: A pair of off-white patent leather stiletto sandals. They feature a minimalist design with a single thin strap over the toes and a delicate, adjustable ankle strap with a small gold-tone buckle. The heel is a high, slender stiletto in the same off-white color. The footbed is black with 'TOM FORD' and 'MADE IN ITALY' printed in white.

overall_description: A pair of elegant Tom Ford high-heeled sandals in a glossy off-white patent leather finish. The minimalist design features thin straps, a high stiletto heel, and a contrasting black insole, creating a chic and sophisticated look.
key_features: Adjustable ankle strap with gold-tone buckle
Contrasting black insole with designer logo
